rag_rules: Generate guarantees using visible feature names and concrete relations, not implementation paths or AADL properties.
Place all AGREE contracts in component type annexes when referencing inputs/outputs directly.
generic_rules: Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees without subcomponent indirection.
Use eq declarations to define boolean conditions for guarantee expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'guarantee "label": expression;' syntax within annex agree {** ... **};
Ensure expression types match: comparisons yield bool, arithmetic yields int/real.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid using subcomponent port names in component type annexes.
